title: Print derived mesh asset (occ-debug-mesh output)
description: Triangulated, per-face mesh derived from a captured BREP. Coordinates are world-space doubles; the single session-level local_origin (manifest) is subtracted by the viewer before downcasting to Float32. Carries no per-asset origin.

partial.description: true when some faces could not be tessellated (broken shape).

failed_faces.description: face_id list that failed to mesh; pairs with partial=true.

faces.description: Per-face submeshes. Empty/absent for bare Edge/Wire inputs.

edges.description: Edge polylines (also the only payload for bare Edge/Wire inputs).

face_id.description: TopExp::MapShapes index key, shared with the event topology_ref.

orientation.description: Drives normal direction; REVERSED / mirror Location flips winding.

positions.description: Flat world-coordinate doubles [x,y,z, ...] (length a multiple of 3).

indices.description: Triangle vertex indices into positions/3 (length a multiple of 3); viewer builds a Uint32 index.

normals.description: Optional per-vertex normals [nx,ny,nz, ...] aligned with positions; recomputed by the viewer if absent.

edge_id.description: TopExp::MapShapes index key, shared with the event topology_ref.

points.description: Flat world-coordinate doubles polyline [x,y,z, ...] (length a multiple of 3).
